Localization.Description: A user changed a session owner

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} executed the "su" command and changed the session owner to {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to execute the "su" command and change the session owner to {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The "su" session of the user {object.account.name} is closed on host {event_src.host}
